query: overcast gray flat lighting dull cloudy day no shadows depth collapsed
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — overcast gray, foggy collapsed depth, dull cloudy atmosphere, monotone bleakness

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of leafless trees and bushes silhouetted against a cloudy sky. A tall, intricately branched tree dominates the right side of the frame, while smaller vegetation and faint horizontal utility lines appear in the lower portion beneath layered clouds.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of leafless trees and bushes rendered as heavy silhouettes against a cloudy sky through deliberate underexposure that crushes shadow detail. A tall, intricately branched tree dominates the right side but has its crown abruptly cut off by the top edge of the frame. Smaller vegetation and faint horizontal utility lines fade into the darkness below layered clouds, while the oppressive monochrome darkness and barren branches evoke a mood of dread and unease.
